title: Playable game thumbnails on Home and immediate launch navigation

requirements.summary: Ensure Home always shows playable game thumbnail cards and selecting one navigates to /games/$gameId to start immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: The Home page renders a grid of game thumbnail cards when games are available.
Clicking/tapping a game card navigates to `/games/$gameId` for that game.
For the seeded predefined games, navigating from the Home page successfully loads the Game Launch page (i.e., does not show 'Game not found' due to missing backend game entries).

file_operations.description: Update the Home page to always render a grid of playable game cards by merging backend-returned games with the predefined game definitions from frontend/src/lib/gameConstants.ts (using the stable IDs). Use the existing GameCard component for thumbnail-card rendering and navigation behavior. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adjust the Game Launch page to gracefully handle missing backend game entries for known predefined game IDs (e.g., match-word-to-image, choose-correct-image) by falling back to predefined metadata from frontend/src/lib/gameConstants.ts instead of immediately showing 'Game not found', while keeping question loading behavior and existing routes intact.

Ensure predefined game metadata is the single source of truth for stable IDs and thumbnail icon paths (keep using the generated asset paths already referenced) and export any additional helpers needed by Home/GameLaunch to consistently map known game IDs to display data.
